title: Al-Mukhtar's Motive in Sending This Army; What Befell Them
description: Befell Them According to Hisham b. Muhammad [al-KalbiJ-Abu MikhnafMusa b. `Amir, who said: Having been expelled by al-Mukhtar [6871 from al-Kufah, Ibn Muti' went to al-Basrah. Not wishing to proceed to Ibn al -Zubayr in Mecca in a state of defeat and flight, he stayed in al-Basrah until `Umar b. `Abd al-Rahman b. al-Harith b. Hisham came to him. Thus, both of them were in al-Basrah.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 21
